purpose: Define the admissibility audit for public or freemium biotech/PDUFA catalyst sources before any Catalyst sleeve backtest.

audit_steps.name: Source inventory
audit_steps.action: List public official and third-party catalyst sources without scraping bulk data.

audit_steps.name: Timestamp proof sample
audit_steps.action: For a tiny future/past sample, verify whether source pages or archived pages prove the date was known before the event.

audit_steps.name: Negative outcome retention
audit_steps.action: Check whether failed, delayed, withdrawn, or missed events remain visible after the outcome.

audit_steps.name: Delisted/acquired retention
audit_steps.action: Check whether sponsors that no longer trade remain in historical source records.

audit_steps.name: Decision
audit_steps.action: Either label the source non-promotable discovery-only or approve a bounded Catalyst exploratory panel.
